title: News: 2025 Q2
description: 15 questions about major events from April to June 2025

questions.question: What sweeping trade policy did Trump announce on April 2, 2025, dubbed 'Liberation Day'?
options: Reciprocal tariffs on nearly all US trading partners
A new trade deal with China
questions.explanation: On April 2, 2025, Trump announced broad reciprocal tariffs on imports from nearly all countries, calling it 'Liberation Day.'

questions.question: What was the baseline tariff rate imposed on most countries under Trump's April 2025 tariff plan?
questions.explanation: A baseline 10% tariff was imposed on most countries, with higher rates for specific nations like China.

questions.question: Which country faced tariffs as high as 145% from the US during the spring 2025 trade war?
questions.explanation: China faced escalating tariffs reaching as high as 145% as the trade war between the US and China intensified in spring 2025.

questions.question: What happened to US stock markets immediately following the 'Liberation Day' tariff announcement?
questions.explanation: US stock markets experienced sharp sell-offs following the tariff announcement, with trillions in market value lost.

questions.question: Which major Catholic event occurred in April 2025 following the death of Pope Francis?
options: A papal conclave to elect a new Pope
questions.explanation: Pope Francis passed away on April 21, 2025, triggering a papal conclave to elect his successor.

questions.question: Who was elected as the new Pope following the death of Pope Francis in 2025?
questions.explanation: American Cardinal Robert Francis Prevost was elected Pope, taking the name Leo XIV, becoming the first American Pope.

questions.question: What name did the newly elected Pope choose?
questions.explanation: The new Pope chose the name Leo XIV.

questions.question: Trump announced a 90-day pause on the highest reciprocal tariffs in April 2025, except for which country?
questions.explanation: Trump paused the highest reciprocal tariffs for 90 days for most countries but maintained and escalated tariffs on China.

questions.question: Which major tech company became the first to reach a $4 trillion market capitalization in 2025?
questions.explanation: Apple became the first company to reach a $4 trillion market capitalization.

questions.question: Which European country's leader visited the White House in spring 2025 amid trade tensions?
questions.explanation: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer visited Washington to negotiate trade terms amid the tariff disputes.

questions.question: What major AI model did Anthropic release in 2025?
questions.explanation: Anthropic released Claude 4 in 2025, advancing their AI assistant capabilities.

questions.question: Which country retaliated against US tariffs by imposing 125% tariffs on American goods?
questions.explanation: China retaliated against US tariffs by imposing 125% tariffs on American goods.

questions.question: What happened to the US dollar after the Liberation Day tariff announcements?
questions.explanation: The US dollar weakened against major currencies as markets reacted negatively to the trade war escalation.

questions.question: Which ride-hailing company announced plans to deploy robotaxis in several new US cities in 2025?
questions.explanation: Waymo continued expanding its robotaxi service to new US cities in 2025.

questions.question: What was the conflict status between Russia and Ukraine in spring 2025?
options: The conflict continued with no ceasefire
questions.explanation: The Russia-Ukraine conflict continued into spring 2025 with no ceasefire agreement reached despite diplomatic efforts.
